scenarios.description: parseFragmentInput(String,Element,baseUri) with non-null context and simple two-element fragment returns list of two nodes
scenarios.precondition: Parser parser = Parser.htmlParser(); Element context = new Document("http://example.com").body();
scenarios.expectedResult: returned list size is 2 and contains one Element of tag "div" and one Element of tag "p"
pseudocode: TEST TC01_O1 parseFragmentInput string overload two nodes

Parser parser = Parser.htmlParser(); Element context = new Document("http://example.com").body(); String fragment = "

"; String baseUri = "http://example.com";

scenarios.description: parseFragmentInput(String,Element,baseUri) with null context and empty fragment returns empty list
pseudocode: TEST TC02_O1 parseFragmentInput string overload empty fragment null context
Parser parser = Parser.htmlParser(); Element context = null; String fragment = ""; String baseUri = "http://x";

scenarios.description: parseFragmentInput(Reader,Element,baseUri) with non-null context and single text fragment returns one TextNode
scenarios.precondition: Parser parser = Parser.htmlParser(); Element context = new Document("u").body();
scenarios.expectedResult: returned list size is 1 and node is a TextNode with text "hello"
pseudocode: TEST TC03_O2 parseFragmentInput reader overload single text node
Parser parser = Parser.htmlParser(); Element context = new Document("u").body(); Reader reader = new StringReader("hello"); String baseUri = "u";

scenarios.description: parseFragmentInput(Reader,Element,baseUri) with null context and multi-element fragment returns list of three nodes
scenarios.expectedResult: returned list size is 3 and tags sequence is ["span","b","i"]
pseudocode: TEST TC04_O2 parseFragmentInput reader overload three elements null context
Parser parser = Parser.htmlParser(); Element context = null; Reader reader = new StringReader(""); String baseUri = "u";

scenarios.description: parseFragmentInput(Reader,Element,baseUri) with Reader that throws IOException results in UncheckedIOException
scenarios.precondition: Parser parser = Parser.htmlParser(); Element context = new Document("u").body(); Reader reader = new Reader(){public int read(char[] cbuf,int off,int len){throw new java.io.IOException("fail");}public void close(){}};
pseudocode: TEST TC07_O2 parseFragmentInput reader overload io error
Parser parser = Parser.htmlParser(); Element context = new Document("u").body(); Reader reader = faultyReader; String baseUri = "u";

scenarios.description: parseFragmentInput(Reader,Element,baseUri) with null context reference returns list with single element under no context
scenarios.precondition: Parser parser = Parser.htmlParser(); Reader reader = new StringReader("<u></u>"); Element context = null;
scenarios.expectedResult: returned list size is 1 and element tag is "u"
pseudocode: TEST TC08_O2 parseFragmentInput reader overload null context single node
Parser parser = Parser.htmlParser(); Reader reader = new StringReader("<u></u>"); Element context = null; String baseUri = "u";

scenarios.description: parseFragmentInput(Reader,Element,baseUri) with whitespace-only fragment returns a TextNode with whitespace
scenarios.precondition: Parser parser = Parser.htmlParser(); Reader reader = new StringReader("   \n  "); Element context = new Document("u").body();
scenarios.expectedResult: returned list size is 1 and TextNode text equals "   \n  "
pseudocode: TEST TC10_O2 parseFragmentInput reader overload whitespace fragment
Parser parser = Parser.htmlParser(); Reader reader = new StringReader("   \n  "); Element context = new Document("u").body(); String baseUri = "u";
